positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial map of interconnected constellations forming a glowing, ethereal cosmic creature—perhaps a winged griffin or a majestic serpent—set against a deep indigo and sapphire velvet background. The composition should be centered, designed to fit perfectly on an apparel chest area, resembling a mystical scientific diagram combined with sacred geometry. Perfect for high-quality screen printing. Intricate line work, minimalist yet detailed, vector art quality, dramatic spotlighting from above, ultra-sharp, high resolution.
